message:
fix(epoch): use activated_epoch for invalidation receipt old_epoch; add InvalidState test coverage

Revert epoch_before_invalidation to spec.activated_epoch (was
incorrectly changed to self.current_epoch in prior commit). The
invalidation receipt should record the epoch the specialization was
activated in, not the engine's current epoch at invalidation time,
since the receipt documents what is being rolled back.

Add InvalidState variant to error display and serde roundtrip test
coverage to ensure the new error variant serializes correctly.

Beads: minor issue tracker updates

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
